false_positives.what_happened: BOOST_AUTO_TEST_CASE waitfor* cases share a large verbatim setup scaffold (TempDbScope + CBlockchainDB::Open + ClusterChainFixture::Build + the CBlockIndex idx_persist / WriteBlock(WriteBlockIndex) block-construction block). Token/line detector sees ~30-line near-identical prologues across distinct test cases and flags within-file copy-paste, but the bodies are legitimately different scenarios (single waiter / timeout floor / notify wakes multiple threads) with different asserts.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: treat test files specially -- when both spans live inside a recognized test-case macro (BOOST_AUTO_TEST_CASE / TEST / TEST_F) and the divergent (post-prologue) tail is below the clone threshold, downweight or suppress. Concretely: clone must include >= N non-setup statements OR the shared region must be the WHOLE case body, otherwise classify as 'shared test fixture' and drop. Cheaper variant: exclude lines matching the per-case fixture-construction idiom (TempDb*/*Fixture .Build / WriteBlock+WriteBlockIndex) from the clone token stream.
